requirements_met: ContentFormat enum with exactly json, markdown, text values
MemoryEpisodeV1 envelope parsing for all three formats
content_format accepts unrecognized values without parse-time errors
Chunk frozen value object with index, text, source_ref, project fields
Comprehensive unit tests with round-trip parsing and extra-field-ignore behavior
validation_results.test_output_summary: 29 passed in 0.05s — comprehensive coverage of ContentFormat enum constraints, MemoryEpisodeV1 parsing (all three formats), extra-field-ignore behavior, round-trip serialization, Chunk immutability and field validation
validation_results.code_quality: Excellent — systematic test organization by class, comprehensive edge case coverage (unrecognized formats, extra fields, none values, validation failures), all independent tests passing
edge_cases_covered: All three ContentFormat variants (json, markdown, text)

criteria_verification.notes: ContentFormat enum constrained to exactly three lowercase values (json, markdown, text). Independent tests test_content_format_has_exactly_three_values and test_content_format_values_are_lowercase both passed.

MemoryEpisodeV1 parses all three envelope formats without error. Independent tests test_parses_valid_json_envelope_without_error, test_parses_valid_markdown_envelope_without_error, and test_parses_text_envelope_without_error all passed.

content_format field accepts unrecognized values (e.g., 'yaml') at parse time without raising. Independent test test_content_format_stored_as_is_for_unrecognized_value passed, confirming field is typed as str rather than validated against ContentFormat enum.
MemoryEpisodeV1 uses ConfigDict(extra='ignore') for forward compatibility. Independent test test_extra_fields_ignored_not_rejected passed, confirming unknown envelope fields are silently dropped.

Chunk is immutable (frozen) and carries all four required fields (index, text, source_ref, project). Independent tests test_chunk_is_frozen_immutable, test_chunk_carries_all_required_fields, test_chunk_with_none_source_ref, and test_chunk_validates_required_fields all passed.

Comprehensive unit tests assert round-trip parsing for each ContentFormat (json, markdown, text) and extra-field-ignore behavior. Independent tests test_round_trip_parse_for_json_format, test_round_trip_parse_for_markdown_format, test_round_trip_parse_for_text_format, and test_round_trip_parse_preserves_extra_field_ignore_behavior all passed.

rationale: All six acceptance criteria verified via independent test execution (29 tests passed). Evidence bundle shows: (1) complete gathering status, (2) no honesty discrepancies, (3) all quality gates passed, (4) independent test signal present and passing. Implementation demonstrates excellent code quality with systematic test organization, comprehensive edge case coverage (unrecognized formats, extra fields, none values, immutability), and forward-compatible schema design. No missing requirements, no test failures, no concerns.
